mapper.select: SELECT preference_type, CASE preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '口味' WHEN 'price' THEN '价格' WHEN 'environment' THEN '环境' WHEN 'service' THEN '服务' ELSE '其他' END AS preference, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) AS avg_score, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_preferences) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_preferences), 2) ELSE 0 END AS percentage, CASE preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '#3b82f6' WHEN 'price' THEN '#10b981' WHEN 'environment' THEN '#f59e0b' WHEN 'service' THEN '#8b5cf6' ELSE '#6b7280' END AS color FROM comment_preferences GROUP BY preference_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT cp.preference_type, CASE cp.preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '口味' WHEN 'price' THEN '价格' WHEN 'environment' THEN '环境' WHEN 'service' THEN '服务' ELSE '其他' END AS preference, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(AVG(cp.score), 2) AS avg_score, CASE WHEN MAX(total.cnt) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / MAX(total.cnt), 2) ELSE 0 END AS percentage FROM comment_preferences cp INNER JOIN comments c ON cp.comment_id = c.id CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment_preferences cp2 INNER JOIN comments c2 ON cp2.comment_id = c2.id WHERE c2.food_id = #{foodId} ) AS total WHERE c.food_id = #{foodId} GROUP BY cp.preference_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT cp.preference_type, CASE cp.preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '口味' WHEN 'price' THEN '价格' WHEN 'environment' THEN '环境' WHEN 'service' THEN '服务' ELSE '其他' END AS preference, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(AVG(cp.score), 2) AS avg_score, CASE WHEN MAX(total.cnt) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / MAX(total.cnt), 2) ELSE 0 END AS percentage FROM comment_preferences cp INNER JOIN comments c ON cp.comment_id = c.id INNER JOIN foods f ON c.food_id = f.id CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment_preferences cp2 INNER JOIN comments c2 ON cp2.comment_id = c2.id INNER JOIN foods f2 ON c2.food_id = f2.id WHERE f2.category_id = #{categoryId} ) AS total WHERE f.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY cp.preference_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT cp.preference_type, CASE cp.preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '口味' WHEN 'price' THEN '价格' WHEN 'environment' THEN '环境' WHEN 'service' THEN '服务' ELSE '其他' END AS preference, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(AVG(cp.score), 2) AS avg_score, CASE WHEN MAX(total.cnt) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / MAX(total.cnt), 2) ELSE 0 END AS percentage, CASE cp.preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '#3b82f6' WHEN 'price' THEN '#10b981' WHEN 'environment' THEN '#f59e0b' WHEN 'service' THEN '#8b5cf6' ELSE '#6b7280' END AS color FROM comment_preferences cp INNER JOIN comments c ON cp.comment_id = c.id CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment_preferences cp2 INNER JOIN comments c2 ON cp2.comment_id = c2.id WHERE c2.user_id = #{userId} ) AS total WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY cp.preference_type ORDER BY count DESC
